title: IoT Ecosystem for Smart Cities
description: A flowchart illustrating the interconnected components and data flow of an Internet of Things system within a smart city environment.
relationships: Networks transmit data to processing platforms
Platforms analyze data and generate insights
Applications use insights for management and automation
Interfaces provide feedback and information to citizens and officials

visuals.title: Cities
visuals.description: IoT in Smart Cities - covering infrastructure, transportation, energy, waste, public safety, environmental monitoring, IoT ecosystem layers, and smart city examples
